feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: >Developers break their backs by developing games >Akamai hosts downloads to tho…
entry.content: >Developers break their backs by developing games >Akamai hosts downloads to those games all over the world so you can download them >GabeN collects 30% for doing literally nothing and wastes it on underage sex party yachts How is this allowed?
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Post the Bush Likelihood of your TV Waifu
entry.content: Very high likelihood — probably 80-90% in-character for Daphne Moon. Daphne (Jane Leeves) is written as a no-nonsense, earthy, working-class Mancunian from a big, chaotic family in 1990s Britain. She's practical, not vain or high-maintenance, and the show leans into her "natural" vibe — frumpy cardigans, psychic quirks, blunt honesty, and zero pretense.
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: You can relax, my friend This life is amazing when you greet it with open arms W…
entry.content: You can relax, my friend This life is amazing when you greet it with open arms Whatever we face, we'll be fine if we're leading from the heart No matter the place, we can light up the world Here's how to start: Greet the world with open arms Greet the world with open arms
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: 70mm is a massive meme
entry.content: saw the odyssey at one of those select special theaters projecting it on 70mm laser bullshit at my girlfriend’s insistence. Not only did it look indistinguishable from any other theater I’ve been to but it actually looked fucking worse because of the violent flashing during every scene involving a bright sky. Thought it was going to give me an electric soldier porygon seizure. Swear to god this is all a massive meme and Nolan and his audience can’t even tell the difference themselves and only pr
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: >Oh, yeah. Bloody hell. I'm sweating in here. Roasting. Boiling. Baking. Swelter…
entry.content: >Oh, yeah. Bloody hell. I'm sweating in here. Roasting. Boiling. Baking. Sweltering. It's like a sauna. Furnace. You can fry an egg on my stomach.
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /b/ Random: I was totally humiliated, and the thing is, I’m fully German myself, but I was b…
entry.content: I was totally humiliated, and the thing is, I’m fully German myself, but I was bullied by this brown Muslim guy who teased me during Skribblio by drawing pictures of me sucking black dicks. And the thing is, one day he bullied me with two other girls they brought him over to their group, where they started flirting with him and laughing at me. And the thing is, one of the girls is an AfD right winger conservative, and the other one is pro Putin WTF, Putin is such a cuck, and the AfD is kike cont
entry.dc:creator: /b/ Random

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: >He waited for Vault Breaker to actually master Cryo >He didn't get Vidmaster in…
entry.content: >He waited for Vault Breaker to actually master Cryo >He didn't get Vidmaster in Season 1 >He didn't get Zonewarden in Season 1 >He didn't try the Hybrid weapon pre nerf >He didn't pre-unlock Sentinel Cryo skin You literally didn't beat the game. Just because you "killed" Compiler into a no player lobby it doesn't mean you achieved anything at all. Marathon is an hardcore PVP game with high stakes and high rewards. You cheated not only the game, but yourself. You didn't grow. You didn't improve.
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Out of curiosity, how much heat do your devices put out in total?
entry.content: Can be a rough estimate. My laptop and game console put out ~100 watts total when both are in use. Yet my room becomes Venusian-like after just 5 minutes without the A/C running. I'm only 55 kilos, it's not a fatso thing.
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Is the aprilia tuareg the closest thing to a perfect motorcycle that has even been created?
entry.content: Every youtube reviewer that has reviewed the tuareg has made a follow up video talking about how they decided to buy on for themselves as their own personal do everything daily driver. Its almost incomprehensible how good the thing is.
entry.dc:creator: /o/ Auto

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: Was going back to the car after groceries at the ethnic shop and some granny ask…
entry.content: Was going back to the car after groceries at the ethnic shop and some granny asked me if I could help her get some pigeons to fuck off cause they keep shitting on her porch. She handed me a pole and a ladder and the moment I get the second one to fly away I hear a woman swearing loudly from her car as she just ran over the other pigeon lmao
entry.dc:creator: /bant/ International/Random

entry.title: /g/ Technology: How would you build a credit stick style system irl?
entry.content: The most common traits of them are >Physical token >Anonymous like cash >Stable in value >Can be used in far apart locations >no login required Is cryptography advanced & assymetric enough for this kind of thing?
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Extension to block lust provoking imagery on this website. Can this "AI" create …
entry.content: Extension to block lust provoking imagery on this website. Can this "AI" create one for me? I am fighting a crippling addiction every day of my life for the last 10 years. The main culprit is cumulative exposure through 4chan board catalogs. Or would it be better to simply disable all images in threads? But then what is the point of an image board...
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: To Ingrid #60
entry.content: Oh Ingrid, my darling, my puzzling sweet queen, The most wonderfully peculiar sight ever seen! Your shimmering blonde hair glows bright as the sun, A dazzling cascade when the morning’s begun. Yet your grating, high voice makes me wince at the sound, The most terribly annoying noise to be found! Your cute little lips make a charming display, Matching the weird, funky hat that you wear every day. And that strange blue dress, so bizarrely designed, Is the single most curious outfit I’ll find. Your
entry.dc:creator: /bant/ International/Random

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /ntrslop/ - Netorare AI Slop General #78

Orcs, goblins, femboys, futa, demons, and similar themes are fine too. Reverse NTR and Lesbian NTR

Too many gens and edits are lost to the archive! https://blacked.booru.org/ >Vtuber BBC Related Clips and Evidence Corpo snowbunnies: https://rentry.co/3od5cn8e Indie coalburners: https://rentry.co/7ry5vvry >Free/Easy 3D/2

entry.title: /g/ Technology: how use youtube, anon? me click youtube.com. me see recommend video, no like the…
entry.content: how use youtube, anon? me click youtube.com. me see recommend video, no like them. me click menu on left, several category open. me click category and read recommend video, me no like. I don't know what videos I like, since I don't use youtube. How do you discover content if the recommendations don't work? Most of my content is Toronto videos about punjabi hip hop dance video.
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /g/ Technology: I tried Alpine, because I wanted something with low resource usage. It uses a wh…
entry.content: I tried Alpine, because I wanted something with low resource usage. It uses a whole 10 MB less RAM than Debian. TEN MEGABYTES. It doesn't boot faster. It uses less disk space. That's the only benefit I noticed. Are "minimalistic" distros a meme?
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: If a majority of Congress had Brain-Computer Interfaces (BCIs) installed that we…
entry.content: If a majority of Congress had Brain-Computer Interfaces (BCIs) installed that were hacked via a backdoor to induce sadistic, violent, and fascistic behavior, the United States would plunge into an immediate constitutional and existential crisis. However, the plan would still trigger massive resistance from the rest of the government, the military, and the public, even if the BCIs in question were required to play the latest VR games. If you want to explore the real-world science or legalities be
entry.dc:creator: /bant/ International/Random

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: early access is the worst thing to happen to games in the last twenty years indi…
entry.content: early access is the worst thing to happen to games in the last twenty years indie devs get to put out an hour of gameplay and then feed off people buying the initial game for the next ten years while they slowly drip feed content at a glacial pace rather than actually just putting out a finished game for people to play fuck indie devs
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: IMAX
entry.content: This has to be the most unnecessary, expensive, over-the-top, useless piece of fucking shit technology on the face of earth. It's also a pain to work with and few theaters out there are equipped to reproduce this format, and nobody gives a flying fuck to watch it. All of this so you can see 2 inches above the characters heads.
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: >DA DUBBA YUUUU beeeEEEEeeee

entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Anyone of you gays have one of these? What do YOU think? Need a good "crossover"…
entry.content: Anyone of you gays have one of these? What do YOU think? Need a good "crossover" that can handle some light off-road and not be terrible for city/hwy driving. I live in Chile btw. Most of our roads are quite good but when you go to cool camping or hiking places, it's always 300-800KM of pristine asphalt, then 30-50km of bad rutted washboarded mountain roads. So it needs to be good at both. I'm looking at a 2.0L AWD model, they go for around $28k new.
entry.dc:creator: /o/ Auto

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: I saw the newest advengers trailer and I thought it was a little silly for one, …
entry.content: I saw the newest advengers trailer and I thought it was a little silly for one, here we go again with the whole war theme, Thor gives a gian speech in the trailer like he's a coach for a highschool football squad. It's just so obvious when Marvel starts to do it, but wars aren't really fought that way. You don' really just stand in a giant huge group of people and run at the opposing side in a huge empty field. They'll never show how war is really fought, I learned all about this in the military
entry.dc:creator: /bant/ International/Random

entry.title: /g/ Technology: PQ wallet v2
entry.content: PQ wallet v2 Offline, client side, Post Quantum resistant cryptographic wallet and tool for use with email, text, forums, untrusted transport. Use it on the go, with mobile device, or remotely. Self host it, post it when you need it, access it anywhere a browser is available. Now with a general symmetric tool for encrypting files or string with PQ resistant AES. ----start of signed text---- White paper: https://files.catbox.moe/oc710p.pdf Wallet Diagram: https://files.catbox.moe/udkqvt.pdf For c
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /int/ International: TVRAN
entry.content: The word for sea in Turkish, Mongolian, and Hungarian all come from the same root word Hungarian: >tenger Turkish: >deniz Mongolian: >tengis Turkish one does not have ng because Modern Turkish had a ng to n shift and Hungarian one ends with r because they probably inherited the word from the Oghuric branch of Turkic languages which had a z to r shift
entry.dc:creator: /int/ International

entry.title: /int/ International: Chinese and Koreans are spiritually Jewish.
entry.content: And I mean this in a good-faith way. They are stereotyped as people who'd rather do math then find a girlfriend or try out sports. They follow their own special version of kosher (sort of) where red meats are de-emphasized in favor of fish, soy, kreplach-esque dumplings, and stuff like kimchi which BTW is literally Korean sauerkraut. Can hardly get much more Jewish than that imho. Their relationship with Western Christian culture often involves assimilation or acceptance struggles, and often vai
entry.dc:creator: /int/ International

entry.title: /b/ Random: Chinese and Koreans are spiritually Jewish.
entry.content: And I don't even mean this in a /pol/ "hurr durr heil hotler" way. Just look at them. They're bugmen who'd rather do math then find a girlfriend or try out sports. They follow their own special version of kosher (sort of) where red meats are de-emphasized in favor of fish, soy, kreplach-esque dumplings, and stuff like kimchi which BTW is literally Korean sauerkraut. Can hardly get much more Jewish than that imho. They keep trying to ass-kiss and sneak-identify into Western Christian culture, yet
entry.dc:creator: /b/ Random

entry.title: /news/ News: DOJ’s Reflecting Pool “Vandalism” Case Falls Apart With Pool Draining
entry.content: https://www.washingtonpost.com/dc-m d-va/2026/07/20/reflecting-pool-rep airs-could-undermine-case-against-f ormer-olympian-judge-says/ Repair work at the Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool done after a former Olympic canoeist was accused of damaging it could jeopardize the government’s case against him, a D.C. Superior Court judge warned Monday. The government is “operating at its own peril,” said Judge Todd E. Edelman, if the Reflecting Pool is altered or not preserved before the defense’s expert
entry.dc:creator: /news/ News

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /slop/ - AI Slop and Image Generation Thread #3038
entry.content: >Workout Edition Fapping-focused AIslop thread for those who enjoy plapping to AI thread perfection. A thread for prompters, editors, requesters, gooners, AI pornmommies, PLAPpers, Stable Diffusion directors, NovelAI artists—anything and everything AIslop. No limits past site rules; use Catbox galleries and uploads if needed. Keep dumps to a minimum and don't be a derailing cunt, thanks. Previous Thread: https://desuarchive.org/trash/threa d/84208438/ >Scripts to check image metadata: rentry.org
entry.dc:creator: /trash/ Off-Topic

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Babymetal
entry.content: >Babymetal IS NOT metal! You're just a butthurt chud who hates women and anything kawaii!! XD >Babymetal IS metal! They know their shit and even Rob Zombie says so!! Bitch, please. Whether they're metal or not is irrelative to their actual quality and technique as musicians. They are a corporate byproduct of Amuse Inc. and whether or not they also count as true metal is not reflective of them being a good metal band by default. They also have the most mid(dling) taste: BMTH? Metallica? Slipknot?
entry.dc:creator: /mu/ Music

entry.content: >You're waiting at the bus stop when... >"Whatchu lookin' at, honkie?! Never seen a BLACK beautiful woman before?!!!" You have 10 seconds before she aggressively sucks your dick. How does the average man from your cunt get of this predicament?

entry.title: /int/ International: how is your Grindr experience in your country?
entry.content: I am a bottom and I waited for men to start with me. the men: >disgusting gym bros who look like they get steroids and looks like fat cartoon characters. their necks look like a boat safety rings >arabs who write in hebrew and pretend to be jewish until you ask them what city they're from >40+ creepy old dudes who hide their age >trans and femboy enjoyers who start with you even when you never mention that you are a femboy or a trans in your profile >tech bros who talk to you like a retard and t

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Watched the long walk As with 99% of Stephen King movies, the ending sucked and …
entry.content: Watched the long walk As with 99% of Stephen King movies, the ending sucked and the premise feels wasted. Felt like they tried super hard to force an R rating via inserting curse words every other line, which is odd given the closeup death scenes likely wouldve gotten them it. And the ending is just dumb. Soldiers vanish after the major is shot because....because they do? Alternate where the winner actually does what he says he will do during the walk makes more sense but im guessing it was axed
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film
